name: Follow Wing
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>追</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>走</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>翼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つばさ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate this card by targeting 1 Synchro Monster you control; it cannot be destroyed by battle or your opponent's card effects. At the start of the Damage Step, if it battles an opponent's Level 5 or higher monster: You can destroy that opponent's monster, and if you do, the targeted Synchro Monster gains ATK equal to the original ATK of the destroyed monster, until the end of this turn. When that monster leaves the field, destroy this card.
eff: Activate this card by targeting 1 Synchro Monster you control; it cannot be destroyed by battle or your opponent's card effects. At the start of the Damage Step, if it battles an opponent's Level 5 or higher monster: You can destroy that opponent's monster, and if you do, the targeted Synchro Monster gains ATK equal to the original ATK of the destroyed monster, until the end of this turn. When that monster leaves the field, destroy this card.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys battling monster at the start of the Damage Step
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
